C0100 Brief Interview for Mental Status Be Conducted Code - The data in this column identifies whether or not a Brief Interview for Mental Status (BIMS) should be performed. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether or not a Brief Interview for Mental Status(BIMS) should be performed. 0 = No (patient is rarely/never understood)
1 = Yes
279 C0200_WORD_RPETE_1ST_ATMPT_CD C0200_WORD_RPETE_1ST_ATMPT_CD C0200 BIMS: Number of Words Repeated After First Attempt - The data in this column
